name: Wallet
desc: A thin, greedy little record-keeper

name: Cigarette
desc: A paper tube of dark tobacco fluff, a silky coffin, a gentle murder

name: Marshmallow
desc: A cloud of childhood memories, soft and brittle like a sack of feathers

name: Bottlecap
desc: The coin of the frontier, pressed from aluminum

name: Chalkboard
desc: A blank slate that collects the grey dust of equations and diagrams

name: Lead pencil
desc: Wood from trees, graphite from stone, alkali from fluids, a marker for a brief era

name: Spork
desc: A utensil that combines eating/shoveling functions

name: Bee
desc: Wings and stinger, pollen and honey

name: Book
desc: Pages of paper stamped with ink in a blind alphabet, garnished with images and letter-seals

name: Sawdust
desc: Days of cutting cured hard oak; useless discarded shavings, picked up in great piles

name: Linoleum
desc: A sheet of oiled linseed clay, a floor covering and relic of craft waning

name: Snowfall
desc: Tiny toppling angels of ice taking wing from the sky, covering the world

name: Moonlight
desc: The weak glow of Earth's sister body, a source of romantic longing and monster stories

name: Sunshine
desc: The energetic, fusion-born photons of our universe that bring us light and joy

name: Lace
desc: Featherlight net of bleached linen, finer than a strand of woman's hair

name: Spider silk
desc: Gossamer threads woven into a quilt, warmth spun from silence

name: Bead curtain
desc: A astral veil of wan pearls, their crystal trails scattered motes of light

name: Crown nautilus
desc: A spiral shell subdivided into chambers, each containing a glowing gas bubble

name: Chandeliers
desc: Fragile glass lanterns that fill an empty cathedral with noonlight

name: Stalactite
desc: A petrified waterfall dropping from a deep dark dome

name: Honeycomb
desc: A stalagmite of honeyfields, a shimmering regression

name: Saffron
desc: A thin curl of red gold plucked from the stigma of a crocus flower, a thousand threads a pound weight

name: Guano
desc: A cryptocurrency native to the Backrooms, the product of a thousand-dimension industrial chicken

name: Etherseed
desc: A seed that sprouts in your hand, the plant growing your way and eating your form

name: Electric lollipop
desc: Cold, sweet, and slightly radioactive, at the center a miniature particle accelerator

name: Gel-pack
desc: A soft patch of gel that heaves and shakes as if it contains a small dream

name: Brae seed
desc: A dried seed that contains its cumulative sunlight as flame

name: Clockwork heart
desc: A network of gold gears and springs the size of a walnut, with chambers that swelled and contracted like breathing

name: Self-weaving cloth
desc: A bolt of white linen that stitches and knits itself as it moves

name: Pearlescent shell
desc: A shell that glows with numerics and codes, writes obscure equations in silent ornate letters on surrounding surfaces

name: Seed pod
desc: A silvery cask, swelling on branches like fruit; within is a fruit, of sense and reason, with wings to bear it aloft

name: The Internet
desc: A network of chemical vapours and artificial entities, imbued with a vaporous humanity

name: AI
desc: A tidepool of thought, fed by data and processing power

name: Clockwork tree
desc: A gilded and spun-copper mechanism reproducing the root of an ivy, a bonsai for minds

name: Computronium
desc: A sapphire-thin slice of technology fused down to its purest form, a matter of mind

name: Womb in a can
desc: A private womb with crucial blood and organ exchange machines, an alternative to pregnancy

name: Faustian Window
desc: All the information in the world on a glass tablet the size of a fingernail

name: Silk stasis bag
desc: An embroidered white silk bag, which keeps its contents as they were at the moment it was drawn

name: Spacial stabilizer
desc: A golden glass lozenge, whose vibrations hold breaches between dimensions in place

name: Quantum computer
desc: A cube of shadowy energies and silicon, the most complex machine that ever existed

name: Holo-visor
desc: A paper-thin eyepatch, its front surface pulsing with flickering, floating holograms

name: Hyperloop pod
desc: A streamlined vehicle that glides through tubes at near-supersonic speed

name: Self-driving car
desc: A cube of glass and metal steered by the ether and its radio rages

name: Microcomputer
desc: An impossibly small machine networked to every other machine in the world

name: Fibre optic cable
desc: A mile of silken thread, conveying data between distant cities

name: Carbon nanotube
desc: Hollow, needle-sharp filaments with myriad uses from construction to computing

name: Warframe
desc: A nanofabric armour with glowing panels and an unforgiving silhouette, a modern suit of heaven-sent strength

name: Power armor
desc: A clunky metal suit worn by heroes, fiercely fashionable in the Eternal Arms Race

name: Jump drive
desc: A silver data storage device, a quintillion floating point numbers in neat array

name: Sleeping pod
desc: A transparent capsule that suspends the body in a dream of relaxation

name: Bio-printing chamber
desc: A layered gel that secretes proteins and weaves collagen into living tissue

name: Nanites
desc: Tiny machines that form from pools of vile green slime, grown to annihilate their own kind

name: Ice cream
desc: Milk solidified by sorcery, variously flavored with frozen woods and oranges

name: Truffle
desc: A subterranean fungal relic, a prize among gourmands

name: Baguette
desc: A reverence of taste, a reverence of texture, the glory of the French Revolution

name: Salted butter
desc: Dense, viscous creaminess preserved with ocean salts, worthy of fat, cooked corn

name: Strawberry
desc: Juicy red fruit, sweet as love, grown in gardens for the price of labor

name: Chapati
desc: Warm unleavened bread, a canvas for curries and stews, the whorls of a common baker's hand

name: Panko
desc: Tiny flakes of fried bread, dry and buttery

name: Yule log cake
desc: Whorls of sponge layered with cream and chocolate buttercream, glittering with sugar dust

name: Caviar
desc: Small black eggs of the sturgeon, salted and served with golden trout roe

name: Sashimi platter
desc: Sliced fish of iridescent scales, red flesh embracing a blue ocean

name: Foxglove
desc: Tall purple pistols, deadly medicine and elixir in equal measures

name: Datura
desc: A purple-petaled flower that yields hypnosis and hallucination

name: Lotus
desc: A floating plant with pink saucer flowers, centered with golden stamens

name: Aloe
desc: A succulent plant with fleshy lance-shaped leaves packed in tight rows, source of an effective cure-all ointment

name: Nettle
desc: A green and white weed with stinging leaves both toxic and healing

name: Turmeric
desc: A rhizome, polished and burning hot with yellow-orange spice

name: Tree of life
desc: A cedar with cluster of green fruit spiraling up a single branch like rope

name: Sugarcane
desc: Long stalks that grow sweet, sticky juice in tropical climes

name: Basil seeds
desc: Tiny black ovals that soak up water and form a gel surrounding them

name: Coal
desc: Blackened rock from a depth of a thousand years

name: Neutron star
desc: A sphere of dead matter compressed to unimaginable density

name: Cold iron
desc: Iron refined at absolute zero, exceptionally durable and inimical to faeries

name: Volcanic glass
desc: An obsidian shard, smoking and slippery in hand

name: Pyrite
desc: Fool's gold that shimmers like an oiled mirror

name: Meteoric iron
desc: A silver ingot as hard as uranium, and as toxic to eat

name: Geode
desc: A fist-sized hollow sphere, its lining studded with dagger fangs of agate

name: Ferrofluid
desc: Black mist soaked into a pool of oil, a physical representation of the magnetic spectrum

name: Bismuth
desc: German silver seething with a spectacular array of metallic colors

name: Gold bar
desc: A dull bar with dents and edge marks, exuding a magical aura

name: Loom
desc: A widely-spaced frame that stretches thread and weaves yarn into cloth

name: Grain mill
desc: A stout millstone turning on its axis, grain falling on one side and flour issuing from the other

name: Camera obscura
desc: A simple, box-like device that projects the world upside down

name: Compass
desc: A thin sliver of magnetic lodestone nestled in a softly ticked brass and glass box

name: Potter's wheel
desc: A turning disk above a wood fire, spinning as a potter molds it with her hands

name: Anvil
desc: A block of scrap-titanium alloy mountainside shaped with a jet-black oxide

name: Hourglass
desc: A conical glass vessel full of marbled white and black sand, a measure of sprint and ritual

name: Greek fire
desc: A mutinous shipboard vat of burning oil, launched onto Armada sails

name: Excalibur
desc: A wavering silver sword, sharper than thought, stronger than marriage

name: Cutlass
desc: A short heavy sword with a curved blade, used by pirates and buccaneers

name: Railgun
desc: Red-oxidized heavy steel with an array of supercooled magnets superheated plasma of

name: Pixie dust
desc: A glowing powder that recovers memories and lost souls

name: Magic ring
desc: A metal band that binds a spirit into service, of wintery fogs, excellencies of mind, winter winds, and other names

name: Wizard cloak
desc: A robe of inscribed fabric, lined with ancient arcana

name: Mana potion
desc: A thimbleful of green liquid, which dulls pain and speeds up healing

name: Lava lamp
desc: A curved vessel of oils and waxes that float and sink with changing warmth

name: Talaria
desc: Sandals with small wings rising from the instep, so swift a traveler could hover above the ground

name: Burkinabé kora
desc: A string instrument made of calabash, wood, and three separate sets of three horsehairs

name: Shamisen
desc: A three-stringed instrument, its parchment soundboard scraping to tones like rain
